info.title: dotnet-affected
info.description:
Determines which projects are affected by a set of changes.
For examples and detailed descriptions see: https://github.com/leonardochaia/dotnet-affected/blob/main/README.md

commands.name: describe
commands.description: Prints the current changed and affected projects.

options.name: --repository-path
options.description:
Path to the root of the repository, where the .git directory is.
[Defaults to current directory, or solution's directory when using --solution-path]

options.name: --solution-path
options.description:
[OBSOLETE: use --filter-file-path] Path to a Solution file (.sln) used to discover projects that may be affected.
When omitted, will search for project files inside --repository-path.

options.name: --filter-file-path
options.description:
Path to a filter file (.sln, .slnx) used to discover projects that may be affected.
When omitted, will search for project files inside --repository-path.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Write useful messages or just the desired output. [default: False]

options.name: --assume-changes
options.description: Hypothetically assume that given projects have changed instead of using Git diff to determine them.

options.name: --from
options.description: A branch or commit to compare against --to.

options.name: --to
options.description: A branch or commit to compare against --from.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: A dotnet Regular Expression used to exclude discovered and affected projects.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --repository-path
options.description:
Path to the root of the repository, where the .git directory is.
[Defaults to current directory, or solution's directory when using --solution-path]

options.name: --solution-path
options.description:
[OBSOLETE: use --filter-file-path] Path to a Solution file (.sln) used to discover projects that may be affected.
When omitted, will search for project files inside --repository-path.

options.name: --filter-file-path
options.description:
Path to a filter file (.sln, .slnx) used to discover projects that may be affected.
When omitted, will search for project files inside --repository-path.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Write useful messages or just the desired output. [default: False]

options.name: --assume-changes
options.description: Hypothetically assume that given projects have changed instead of using Git diff to determine them.

options.name: --from
options.description: A branch or commit to compare against --to.

options.name: --to
options.description: A branch or commit to compare against --from.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: A dotnet Regular Expression used to exclude discovered and affected projects.

options.name: --format
options.description: Space-seperated output file formats. Possible values: <traversal, text, json>. [default: traversal]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Only output to stdout. No output files will be created. [default: False]

options.name: --output-dir
options.description:
The directory where the output file(s) will be generated.
Relative paths will be based on --repository-path.

options.name: --output-name
options.description:
The filename to create.
Format file extensions will be appended. [default: affected]

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
